content: Combine Employee Name and Secondary Email. If no secondary email, just show the name.

Okay, I can help you create an expression that combines the Employee Name and Secondary Email. If there's no secondary email, it will just display the employee's name.

```
If(Len(SecondaryEmail) > 0, Concat(EmployeeName, " (", SecondaryEmail, ")"), EmployeeName)
```

This expression will produce a **Text** output.

Suggested column name: **Employee Contact Info**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Use this expression|Validate with sample data|Explain this expression}}
